The Pine Nut ledge is traceabe for 800 feet across
the Captain SAM This marvellous deposi! of gold
bearing ORE ranges from Is to 20 feet in width aid
gives general assay value of $75 per ton. four
foot ledge has been opened at six places the Ken
lucky giving uniform value of better than 500 per
ton. This ledge is the same vein from which
tional values are being taken the Consolidated.
At every point where these lodges have been or
ened on the Kentucky and Captain Sam, they have
stood the most exhaustive tests and given values of
from $75 to 500 to the ton. The vein on the Ken
lucky has been proven to depth of so feet and has
broadened out and become richer with depth. On
the Arkansas two lodges averaging from four to six
feet in width reveal values of better than 800 per
ton.
